chunks.title: Abijah's Reign and Army
chunks.reason: Introduces Abijah's accession, reign details, and the opposing armies.

chunks.title: Abijah's Speech to Jeroboam
chunks.reason: A continuous speech where Abijah argues for Davidic legitimacy and contrasts Judah's worship with Israel's.

chunks.title: The Battle of Mount Zemaraim
chunks.reason: Describes the ambush, the battle cry, the divine victory, and the aftermath.

chunks.title: Abijah's Later Years and Death
chunks.reason: Concludes with Abijah's family details and the reference to the prophetic record.
